arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti confirms Real Madrid star will continue out of position vs Osasuna
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has confirmed that Federico Valverde will continue to line out in defence in the club’s next outing. Real, of course, are primed to return…

arts.ttl: Ancelotti serene amid Vini to Saudi league link
arts.sum: Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti is not paying much attention to the ongoing speculation that Vinícius Júnior could leave the club this summer and play in Saudi Arabia.

arts.ttl: Spending spree: Real Madrid ready to sell Vini Jr to fund transfers for Arsenal star & Man Utd target
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly considering three big-name transfer targets they could spend the money from Vinicius Junior’s sale on. It remains to be seen if the Spanish giants will definitely be prepared to let an important player like Vinicius leave, but he could command an enormous transfer fee and allow the club to spend on […] The post Spending spree: Real Madrid ready to sell Vini Jr to fund transfers for Arsenal star & Man Utd target appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Vinicius Junior update: Carlo Ancelotti addresses fresh rumours surrounding Saudi Arabia-linked Real Madrid superstar
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has insisted that he is "not worried" when it comes to Vinicius Junior's future despite the constant speculation linking the attacker with a move to the Saudi Pro League.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti provides triple Real Madrid injury update
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has on Friday provided updates on the wellbeing of three members of his squad. Real, of course, are in the midst of final preparations…

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “Rüdiger, Alaba and Vázquez will be available vs Manchester City”
arts.sum: He was asked about the availability of three players — David Alaba, Antonio Rüdiger and Lucas Vázquez — and he confirmed that all three will be available for Manchester City . Ancelotti on being tired of the Vinicius Jr and Saudi Arabia links

arts.ttl: Ancelotti 'not concerned' about reports of Saudi Arabia tempting Vinicius away from Real Madrid
arts.sum: “I see a happy player who is playing well and wants to make history with this club,” Ancelotti said a day before Madrid defends its Spanish league lead at Osasuna. “If God is willing, then we will be able to conclude our talks in the coming days and I can stay here even longer,” the player said after helping Madrid win 3-2 at Manchester City in the Champions League playoff.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti on why Raul Asencio can’t guarantee starting spot, 3 players back for Manchester City
arts.sum: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti has confirmed that they will have several regulars back in action for the second leg of their Champions League play-off with Manchester City. He also noted that one of them would be back in the starting line-up for that game, but refused to confirm whether it would be Raul Asencio, […] The post Carlo Ancelotti on why Raul Asencio can’t guarantee starting spot, 3 players back for Manchester City appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Man City are dealt major injury blow with first-team star facing up to 10 weeks out after being forced off in Real Madrid defeat
arts.sum: City face Newcastle in a crunch clash that could go a long way to deciding whether they qualify for next season's Champions League after what has been a difficult campaign for Pep Guardiola's side.

arts.ttl: Julien Faubert explains reaction to Real Madrid calling him at West Ham – Wants to set record straight on viral moment
arts.sum: Ask 100 football fans to name one of the most random transfers of all time, and Julien Faubert’s move from West Ham United to Real Madrid is likely to come up.
